set.body: Guard the new perf/feature code with cross-library evidence: (1) Svds.svd top-k (Largest and Smallest) vs Breeze svd extremes on tall+wide matrices — singular values elementwise, singular vectors sign/subspace-aware like the eigSym comparisons; (2) blocked-QR shapes (min(m,n) > 96 so the compact-WY path engages) through the existing QR parity invariants (reconstruction, orthonormality, RtR=AtA, least-squares vs backslash). Written after SpectralParitySuite predated Svds and blocked QR.
